disclaimer: Documentation and organizational patterns from field experience. Not legal advice.

templates.body:
BANKRUPTCY CLAIM PREP
Case name/number: _______________  Chapter: ___
Claim deadline: _______  [ ] calendar alert set
Attach: payment log, severance trail, judgment if any
NOT LEGAL ADVICE. Counsel reviews before file.

CLAIM AMOUNT WORKSHEET (factual)
Total promised per plan: $_______
Total paid: $_______  Owed (factual): $_______
Basis: severance plan / agreement tab ___
Supporting exhibits: _______________

QUEUE REALITY MEMO (pattern note)
Your claim class: unsecured employee / severance
Observed: admin or insider motions may pay first
Implication: discuss recovery expectations with counsel only
Facts to track: _______________
